---
title: "clinical_data_feature_selection"
output: html_document
---

# Configuration

```{r echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```

Draw plot:

```{r, fig.width=9, fig.height=7}
# 1. Load your selection data (replace path if necessary)
clinical_variables <- read_excel(
    path = "data/raw/clinical_variables_selection.xlsx",
    range = "A1:C30"
    )
    

# 2. Preprocess factor levels and build the academic horizontal bar chart
clinical_variables |> 
    mutate(
        # Harmonize and order the feasibility categories for a clean legend flow
        Predimar = factor(
            Predimar, 
            levels = c("yes", "categorized", "modified", "no")
        )
    ) |> 
    # Order the vertical axis dynamically based on the absolute count of scores
    ggplot(aes(x = reorder(Variable, Scores), y = Scores, fill = Predimar)) +
    
    # Grid bars with subtle medical-themed dark slate borders
    geom_col(color = "#2c3e50", width = 0.75, linewidth = 0.4, alpha = 0.85) +
    
    # Add precise numerical counts to the tip of each bar
    geom_text(
        aes(label = Scores),
        hjust = -0.4,
        size = 3.2,
        fontface = "bold",
        color = "#1e293b"
    ) +
    
    # Invert coordinates to maintain textbook readability for long clinical terms
    coord_flip(clip = "off") +
    
    # Force integer ticks on the score axis and leave breathing room for text labels
    scale_y_continuous(
        breaks = seq(0, max(clinical_variables$Scores), by = 1),
        expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.08))
    ) +
    
    # Professional, high-contrast palette mapped to clinical translation categories
    scale_fill_manual(
        values = c(
            "yes"         = "#10b981",
            "categorized" = "#f59e0b",
            "modified"    = "#3b82f6",
            "no"          = "#ef4444"
        ),
        labels = c(
            "yes"         = "Directly Available",
            "categorized" = "Derivable",
            "modified"    = "Related",
            "no"          = "Not Available"
        )
    ) +
    
    # Formal chart metadata configuration
    labs(
        title = "Risk Score Variables Selection Analysis",
        subtitle = "Predictors ranked by literary frequency across validation scores and PREDIMAR cohort feasibility status",
        x = NULL,
        y = "Frequency Count Across Reviewed Risk Scores",
        fill = "PREDIMAR Cohort Feasibility"
    ) +
    
    # Minimalist theme architecture tailored for academic thesis compilation
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, margin = margin(b = 4)),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "#64748b", size = 9, margin = margin(b = 15)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", color = "#334155", size = 9.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(color = "#475569"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", color = "#1e293b", margin = margin(t = 10)),
        legend.position = "top",
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = "#1e293b", size = 9.5),
        legend.text = element_text(color = "#334155", size = 9),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(), # Removes horizontal grid noise to separate variables
        panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "#e2e8f0", linewidth = 0.5)
    )
```
